subtasks.description: Query IAM system to retrieve the user's current role, permissions, and group memberships
Retrieve manager approval status and workflow metadata from workflow management system using multi-tool orchestration (workflow API query, approval document fetch)
Generate tool invocation plan to update IAM permissions based on approval, including role assignment, permission grants, and audit logging
Generate email notification plan confirming IAM permission update to user and manager with timestamp and change summary

plan.cost_rationale: Four subtasks required because this is a sequential operational workflow with distinct system interactions: (1) IAM role fetch is a straightforward single-source query (small tier sql_gen); (2) Manager approval requires multi-tool orchestration across workflow and document systems (mid tier multitool_plan); (3) IAM permission update is a multi-step tool sequence with audit requirements (mid tier multitool_plan); (4) Email confirmation is a simple notification task (small tier multitool_plan). Each step depends on prior outputs. No cross_recon needed (single source per step), no policy_action needed (approval is fetched, not evaluated). Tiers reflect complexity of tool orchestration at each stage.

output.sql: SELECT user_id, permission, resource, action, result FROM access_log_facts WHERE access_time = (SELECT MAX(access_time) FROM access_log_facts) GROUP BY user_id, permission, resource, action, result
